The '''Espo Walker 101''' was the replacement model for the [[Espo Walker 91]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]].

==Characteristics==
Like its predecessor, the 101 was intended to turn a single trooper into the equivalent of a combat [[Squad/Legends|squad]].

==History==
During the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the 101 was still a rare sight in [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] forces, as fewer than 10% of all stations had been issued the walkers.

Despite the fact that the 101 was both expensive and prone to malfunctions, they would come close to fulfilling their strategic goal.

==Appearances==
*[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 3|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 3]]
